tasks.subject: Task 1: favoriteStore module + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 로컬 전용 즐겨찾기 `Record<string, true>` 저장소를 `$state` + appSettings persist로 제공한다.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/storage/favoriteStore.svelte.ts`
- Create: `app/tests/unit/storage/favoriteStore.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- has() returns false before load()
- toggle() returns new state (true on add, false on remove)
- forget() removes membership and is no-op for unknown
- persist is debounced 300ms
- load() is idempotent
- load() restores existing data
- _reset() clears state

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- favoriteStore && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/storage/favoriteStore.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/storage/favoriteStore.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- favoriteStore && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["has() returns false before load()", "toggle() returns new state", "forget() no-op for unknown", "persist debounced 300ms", "load() idempotent", "load() restores existing data", "_reset() clears state"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Rewrite noteManager favorite API + callers + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `toggleFavorite`/`isFavorite`/`sortForList` 본체 교체 + 모든 callers + favorite.test.ts 재작성.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/lib/core/noteManager.ts:261-292`
- Modify: `app/tests/unit/favorite.test.ts`
- Modify: `app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte:572-577`
- Modify: `app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte:723-730`
- Modify: `app/src/lib/desktop/SidePanel.svelte:90-95`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- toggleFavorite returns boolean
- note.tags and metadataChangeDate untouched
- isFavorite ignores legacy system:pinned tag
- sortForList ignores favorites in ordering
- callers use sync toggleFavorite + boolean-based toast
- SidePanel sort drops pinned bonus
- all tests + svelte-check pass

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/core/noteManager.ts", "app/tests/unit/favorite.test.ts", "app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/SidePanel.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["toggleFavorite returns boolean", "note.tags untouched", "legacy tag ignored", "sort ignores favorites", "callers sync with boolean toast", "SidePanel sort cleaned", "all tests + check pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire favoriteStore.load() into +layout + manual verify
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 앱 부팅 시 favoriteStore가 한 번 로드되도록 wire하고, dev 서버에서 즐겨찾기 동작을 수동 확인한다.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/routes/+layout.svelte`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- favoriteStore.load() called in +layout onMount
- tests + svelte-check pass
- manual: badge toggles reactively, persists across refresh, does not affect sort order, appears in TopNav sheet, persisted in appSettings local:favorites

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test && npm run check` + manual dev server checks

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/+layout.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["load() wired in onMount", "tests + check pass", "manual dev verification"]}
```
